recalls.Description: BCI Burke is recalling the Inclusive Orbit, a spinning playground component resembling a merry-go-round. This product features three handrails and a seating capacity for six children, with a platform that is level with the surrounding ground. The affected model numbers are 560-0042 and 560-0051. Owners can reach out to BCI Burke to verify if their unit is part of the recall.
recalls.Title: BCI Burke Recalls Inclusive Orbit Playground Merry-Go-Rounds Due to Crush Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact BCI Burke Company at 800-266-1250 from 7:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email orbit@bciburke.com, or visit https://www.bciburke.com/recall for further details.

Products.Name: Inclusive Orbit Playground Merry-Go-Round
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 415 (In addition, about 6 were sold in Canada)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received reports of two incidents of fingers getting trapped in the gap between the rotating platform and the outer rim, resulting in two finger crushing injuries.

Manufacturers.Name: Playdale Playgrounds LTD, of United Kingdom

Retailers.Name: Available through factory representatives directly to municipalities, schools, and churches from April 2019 until October 2024, priced between $11,900 and $14,550.

Importers.Name: BCI Burke Company Inc., of Fond Du Lac, Wisconsin

Hazards.Name: Crush hazard due to a gap between the rotating platform and the stationary outer rim.

Remedies.Name: Immediately cease use of the recalled merry-go-rounds and consult the equipment owner, such as a park director or school principal, to check if the equipment has been inspected and repaired. Contact BCI Burke to arrange for an inspection and free onsite repair.

recalls.metaDescription: BCI Burke recalls Inclusive Orbit merry-go-rounds due to crush hazards. Learn how to check your unit and arrange repairs.
